name: cassia senna
title: cassia senna benefits
description: Cassia senna reduces blood sugar levels by lowering the body's glucose levels, making it easier for glucose to be absorbed by cells and reducing the amount of glucose in the bloodstream. This benefit is crucial as high blood sugar levels can lead to serious health issues, such as insulin resistance, type 2 diabetes, and even heart disease, which can result in increased healthcare costs, reduced quality of life, and even mortality.
